problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: The key to Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? is Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species — specifically Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
